text: Extension of PUSU Deadline to 28 July 2026
Recommended cash offer (scheme) for Mitie by OCS Group International Limited of 218.5p per share and A final dividend of 3.1p per share

Prologis believes that the Segro defence relies on unrealistic risk assessments and assumptions to arrive at the various NAV uplifts and earnings projections. Prologis remain ready to engage with the Segro Board
Publication of the Scheme Document by Ratio Petroleum Energy LP. The Court and General meetings to be held on 17 August 2026
Publication of the Scheme Document by Genel Energy plc
In its Response Document the AIRE Board unanimously recommends the shareholders not to accept the Glenstone offer and to withdraw their acceptances as soon as possible
